channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Congress Should Reject Taxpayer Funding for the Ballroom
item.description: A new ballroom is not a scandal, but it should be privately funded as originally promised, not by taxpayers.

item.title: Fosse for the Defense
item.description: Exploring the show business origins of vox-pop commentary.

item.title: The Iran War Is Piling Up A List Of Surprises
item.description: New revelations about the war with Iran keep emerging. They have not yet formed a clear picture, but they suggest certain characteristics...

item.title: Why Britainâs Elections Portend Trouble For America
item.description: Britain is fracturing along ethnic lines, steadily moving toward civil war along with the entire Western world, including the United States.
